response: {"name":"Public CLIP Database and iCLIP data processing","description":"Processing of publicly available iCLIP, HITS-CLIP, and PAR-CLIP datasets downloaded from SRA/ERA, including adapter trimming, PCR duplicate removal, and peak calling, following a pipeline similar to eCLIP-seq with method-specific distinctions.","data_type":"sequencing","raw_data_source":"SRA/ERA (accessions listed in Supplementary Table 1)","steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"Raw sequencing data for iCLIP, HITS-CLIP, and PAR-CLIP datasets were downloaded from the SRA/ERA as listed in Supplementary Table 1.","input_data":"Public CLIP dataset accessions (SRA/ERA)","output_data":"Raw sequencing reads (FASTQ files)","software":"SRA/ERA download tools","software_version":null,"parameters":{},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"Adapter trimming was performed once on the raw reads using cutadapt.","input_data":"Raw sequencing reads (FASTQ files)","output_data":"Adapter-trimmed reads","software":"cutadapt","software_version":null,"parameters":{"trimming_rounds":"1"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"Reads were aligned to the genome and datasets with fewer than 100,000 uniquely mapped reads were discarded.","input_data":"Adapter-trimmed reads","output_data":"Aligned reads (BAM files); datasets passing read count threshold retained","software":"STAR","software_version":null,"parameters":{"min_uniquely_mapped_reads":"100000"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"PCR duplicate removal was performed in a library-preparation-specific manner: for iCLIP datasets, random-mers (if present) were extracted from reads and used for PCR duplicate removal as in eCLIP; for HITS-CLIP and PAR-CLIP datasets, reads with the same mapping start position were assumed to be PCR duplicates and removed.","input_data":"Aligned reads (BAM files)","output_data":"Non-duplicate reads (deduplicated BAM files)","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"iCLIP_dedup_method":"random-mer based (if present), consistent with eCLIP protocol","HITS-CLIP_dedup_method":"same start position","PAR-CLIP_dedup_method":"same start position"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"Peak calling was performed on non-duplicate reads only, following the same approach as eCLIP peak calling (CLIPper).","input_data":"Non-duplicate reads (deduplicated BAM files)","output_data":"Called peaks (peak BED/cluster files)","software":"CLIPper","software_version":null,"parameters":{"input_reads":"non-duplicate only"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":6,"description":"Usable read density plots and smoothed kernel density histograms were generated in Matlab using the distributionPlot package with default settings.","input_data":"Aligned and deduplicated read counts per dataset","output_data":"Usable read density plots and kernel density histograms","software":"Matlab with distributionPlot package","software_version":null,"parameters":{"settings":"default"},"code_reference":null}],"figures_produced":["Figure 1","Figure 2","Figure 3","Figure 4","Figure 1a","Figure 1b","Figure 1b–c","Figure 1d","Figure 2a","Figure 2b","Figure 2c","Figure 2d","Figure 2e","Figure 3a","Figure 3a–b","Figure 3b","Figure 3c","Figure 3d","Figure 3e","Figure 3f","Figure 4a","Figure 4a–d","Figure 4b","Figure 4c–d"]}
